sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101958" key="sxolero/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σχολερός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ά</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n101958.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">idle</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σχολερὸν προσθεῖναι τὰς αἰτίας τῷ γράμματι</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a waste of time</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0748.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sever.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Clyst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
